untranslatable_reason: The signal requires precise detection of retracement between 38.2%-61.8% Fibonacci levels from a climax extreme, and identification of climax days. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and Fibonacci calculation logic not expressible with simple 3-field indicator comparisons. The 'climax day' identification and retracement measurement require contextual bar analysis beyond allowed operators.
translation_notes: Approximated entry using Donchian extremes (new highs/lows) as proxy for climax days, price_pos_20 as retracement proxy (assumes middle value ~50% zone), and volume confirmation. Stop loss set to 2 ATR equivalent (2.0% as standard risk). Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. This is a simplified representation; full Fibonacci retracement logic cannot be expressed in the constraint schema.
